events.title: Ubud Folk Festival 2026 — Half a Decade of Harmony
events.description: The fifth edition of Ubud's signature outdoor music festival returns to Biji World for two days of folk, indie and world music alongside live art performances, drum circles, a lantern parade, artist-led workshops, an art market and family programming. Founded in 2022, the festival has gathered Indonesian and international artists in the open-air jungle gardens of Mas village, south of central Ubud — an annual community gathering that resists the resort circuit and keeps its feet on the ground.
events.short_description: Five years of Ubud's folk and world-music festival: live music, art, drum circles and a lantern parade at Biji World, Mas.
